steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The sentence says UNESCO hopes sites will not be willfully damaged or left to ______. Both blanks describe negative outcomes the UN wants to prevent, so the missing word must name something bad that happens to a protected site when it is neglected.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'provoke.': Leaving a site to “provoke” makes no sense grammatically or logically. ✗
  • Choice B — 'regenerate.': Regenerate means to grow or improve — a positive outcome UNESCO would welcome, not prevent. ✗
  • Choice C — 'deteriorate.': Deteriorate means to decline or worsen over time — exactly the negative outcome UNESCO's preservation mission aims to stop. ✓
  • Choice D — 'diversify.': Diversify is neutral and doesn't fit the context of neglect or damage. ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
